testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular > renders the empty-state component with input-driven copy and tone
@stynx-web/angular > generates UUIDv7-shaped request ids for API headers
@stynx-web/angular > falls back to Math.random when web crypto is unavailable
@stynx-web/angular > generates deterministic UUIDv7 bytes from fallback entropy and timestamp
@stynx-web/angular > generates deterministic UUIDv7 bytes from web crypto entropy and timestamp
@stynx-web/angular > preserves caller request ids
@stynx-web/angular > applies request-id, tenant, and auth headers and refreshes after 401
@stynx-web/angular > refreshes after a mapped unauthorized SDK error
@stynx-web/angular > passes auth through when bearer mode is disabled and shows a re-login action when refresh is empty
@stynx-web/angular > skips auth without a provider and does not retry non-retryable errors
@stynx-web/angular > does not treat malformed bearer-looking authorization headers as retryable attempts
@stynx-web/angular > rethrows errors inside the injected zone and ticks non-destroyed apps after delivery
@stynx-web/angular > skips the post-error tick when the injected app ref is already destroyed
@stynx-web/angular > leaves bearer requests unchanged when the provider has no token
@stynx-web/angular > passes unauthenticated mapped 401 errors through without refresh
@stynx-web/angular > maps server errors through ErrorBannerService
@stynx-web/angular > maps HTTP error context and omits falsy status from banners
@stynx-web/angular > maps HTTP errors without optional code, status, or context fields
@stynx-web/angular > passes non-HTTP errors through without showing a banner
@stynx-web/angular > resolves tenant context from query, subdomain, then default resolver
@stynx-web/angular > tracks toast service signal and observable lifecycles
@stynx-web/angular > keeps empty-state component inputs as configured
@stynx-web/angular > provides standalone stynx defaults with feature-provider overrides
@stynx-web/angular > registers module error mapping outside auth refresh handling
